name: Attica Bank S.A.
summary: Attica Bank S.A., together with its subsidiaries, provides various banking products and services to individuals, small and medium enterprises, and large companies in Greece. The company operates through Retail Banking, Corporate Banking, and Capital Management/Treasury segments. It offers savings, current, sight deposit, sight, and tiered interest rate sight interest bearing accounts, as well as repos and time deposits. The company also provides home, consumer, green, and long and short term loans; and loans to buy or renovate business premises. In addition, it offers credit, debit, and prepaid cards; letters of guarantee; POS terminals; insurance products; mutual funds, margin accounts, and share trading; and factoring, leasing, cash management, and treasury services. Further, the company provides intermediate services on mutual fund unit disposals; and portfolio and asset management services. As of December 31, 2020, it operated through a network of 54 branches. The company was founded in 1925 and is headquartered in Athens, Greece.
